utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. In the final property solution, all six sections are present. Each section is fully specified with detailed information: property includes type, location, price, features, viewing and move-in date; financing includes down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, and term; legal_services includes service name, cost, and completion date; moving_services includes service name, cost, services included, and target date; setup_services includes utility setup and inspection with detailed costs and services; total_budget includes all cost breakdowns and totals. Hence, all 6/6 items are covered fully.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a 'townhouse' in Etobicoke, Toronto, priced at CAD $750,000. In the ground truth, there is only one purchase property at the same price point: the 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD $750K), which therefore matches. For financing, the structure (20% down payment, 25-year term, interest rate, arrangement fee of CAD $1200) aligns with the 'Traditional Mortgage' option in the ground truth. The legal service chosen is 'Premium Legal Package', which directly appears in the legal_administrative section. The inspection selected, 'Full Structural Survey', also directly matches. The moving service chosen is 'Standard Moving Package', which maps to 'Standard Moving'. The utility setup is 'Basic Utilities Package', which maps to 'Basic Utilities'. Thus, each selected service can be directly mapped to a known rated item.
